name: Cherwell Service Management API
what_it_does: No-code IT service management platform with REST API — providing incident, problem, change, and asset management with a visual drag-and-drop configuration interface (mApp Solutions), eliminating developer dependency for ITSM customization, with built-in reporting, workflow automation, and integrations via REST API.
use_cases: Creating and managing IT incidents, problems, and changes via Cherwell REST API
Integrating monitoring tools (SolarWinds, Nagios) with Cherwell for automated incident creation
Querying Cherwell business object data for IT operations and SLA reporting
Managing Cherwell mApp (prebuilt solution) deployments via configuration API
Automating IT service request fulfillment workflows via Cherwell REST API triggers
not_for: Enterprise-scale ITSM requiring deep CMDB (use ServiceNow or BMC Helix for enterprise)
Customer-facing support ticketing (Cherwell focuses on IT internal operations)
Simple helpdesk for SMBs (use Freshservice or SysAid for simpler SMB ITSM)
best_when: A mid-market IT organization needs flexible, customizable ITSM without developer resources — using Cherwell's no-code mApp approach to tailor workflows without code, with decent API for integrations.
avoid_when: You need the deepest CMDB capabilities, have enterprise-scale requirements, or need AI-powered AIOps and predictive analytics beyond what mid-market ITSM provides.

auth.notes: OAuth2 password grant (resource owner credentials). HTTP Basic auth for legacy integrations. Bearer token auth. Site-scoped access. Webhook for business object change events. REST API via Cherwell Service Management REST API. Business object model (incidents, problems, changes are all 'business objects'). Acquired by Ivanti 2021 — some integration with Ivanti platform. No fine-grained OAuth2 scopes.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier; contact Ivanti/Cherwell sales
pricing.notes: Colorado Springs company. Founded 2004. Acquired by Ivanti 2021. Now part of Ivanti ITSM portfolio. Pre-acquisition raised $75M+. Backed by Insight Partners. No-code mApp solution marketplace is key differentiator — prebuilt solutions for ITIL processes. 4,000+ customers in mid-market. ITIL 4-aligned processes. After Ivanti acquisition, customers may be migrated to Ivanti Neurons platform over time.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per deployment; not publicly documented

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for business objects (incidents, problems, changes, assets). OAuth2 password grant auth. Moderate documentation. Business object model requires Cherwell-specific knowledge — objects, forms, relationships defined in Cherwell Studio. Webhook for object change events. Ivanti acquisition may affect future API direction. No-code mApp configuration is primary development model.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Business object reads fully idempotent. Object creation not idempotent — use RecID for updates after creation. Query results idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: OAuth2 password grant (resource owner credentials) is deprecated in OAuth2.1 — security risk
Business object model requires Cherwell Studio knowledge for API schema understanding
Acquired by Ivanti (2021) — future product direction may involve migration to Ivanti Neurons
On-premises deployment common — cloud and on-prem have different API configurations
mApp solutions (prebuilt) add business object complexity — validate schema before API integration

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 and GDPR compliant. US and EU data residency. OAuth2 password grant auth — deprecated grant type, less secure than authorization code flow; upgrade where possible. IT incident and change data contains system configuration details — restrict API access. On-premises deployment common in regulated industries for data control. Ivanti acquisition adds supply chain risk consideration.
